result.reason: The current connection tree search functionality does not include child connections when their parent folder matches the search criteria, leading to an incomplete display of search results.
result.approach: Refactor `ConnectionTreeSearchTextFilter` to pre-calculate a set of all `ConnectionInfo` objects that should be visible based on the filter text. This set will include: 1) objects directly matching the filter criteria; 2) all descendants of a matching `ContainerInfo`; and 3) all ancestors of any matching `ConnectionInfo` or `ContainerInfo`. The `Filter` method will then simply check for presence in this pre-calculated set.
